title: Coregentis Lineage Record
description: Cross-cutting lineage record for Coregentis runtime objects. Preserves source and derivation semantics before object-specific schemas are introduced.

creation_source.description: Creation source class defined by the Coregentis object registry baseline.

derivation_mode.description: How this object relates to prior objects or artifacts.

parent_object_id.description: Immediate parent or governing predecessor object, if applicable.

source_object_ids.description: Source Coregentis object identifiers that contributed to this object.

source_event_ids.description: Source event identifiers associated with this object's creation or update.

source_artifact_refs.description: External or protocol artifact references preserved for reconstructability.

promoted_from_object_id.description: Source object identifier for governed promotion, if applicable.
